name: Sovereign Cinder-Blade
description: Notes A very powerful slow-shooting katana bearing similarity to the Doom Bow, albeit much more powerful. When Out of Combat, Sovereign Cinder-Blade beats practially every katana except the Enforcer at very low DEF. However, when In Combat, Sovereign Cinder-Blade loses significant damage output, being outdamaged by Enforcer until roughly 41 DEF on all classes, and Celestial Blade at very low DEF.
effects: On Shoot: When in combat, ATT Decrease (-10 ATT) for 1 second
